title: Coin to shop消费了！
description: 消费了（Cointoshop）是一个轻量的商店/消费系统模组，提供直观的商店 UI、分类标签、排序与渐进式同步，支持服务端/整合包定制。Cointoshop is a lightweight shop system mod that provides an intuitive shop UI, category tabs, sorting, and progressive synchronization, supporting server/modpack customization.
body:
## 📦 消费了 (Coin To Shop)

**消费了 (Cointoshop)** 是一个轻量的商店系统模组，提供直观的商店UI、分类标签，并支持管理员在游戏中直观调整交易内容与排序。

本模组最初是为 **[下单了 (Order To Cook)](https://modrinth.com/mod/order-to-cook)** 提供商店支持而制作，也可独立使用。

---

### ✨ 主要功能

| 操作 | 说明 |
|:---|:---|
| **打开商店** | 默认按 **O 键** |
| **浏览分类** | 鼠标移至左侧标签，点击切换 |
| **购买商品** | 鼠标移至内容区网格，显示高亮与详细Tooltip |
| **编辑模式** | OP输入指令 `/cts editmode true` 进入 |
| **增删排序** | 编辑模式中自由删减商品、拖拽排序 |
| **快速更换** | 编辑模式中打开商品菜单，左右键快速更换交易内容 |

---

### 🔧 兼容性说明

- **平台**：本模组基于Fabric 1.21.1 模板文件制作
- **NeoForge 1.21.1**：采用 [**信雅互联 (Sinytra Connector)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) 证实可用，但未经多模组环境充分测试

---
**English Version**


## 📦 Coin To Shop

**Coin To Shop** is a lightweight shop system mod that provides an intuitive shop UI, category tabs, and allows administrators to intuitively adjust trade content and sorting in-game.

This mod was originally created to provide shop support for **[Order To Cook](https://modrinth.com/mod/order-to-cook)** , but can also be used independently.

---

### ✨ Main Features

| Action | Description |
|:---|:---|
| **Open Shop** | Press the **O key** by default |
| **Browse Categories** | Hover over left-side tabs, click to switch |
| **Purchase Items** | Hover over content grid to see highlight and detailed tooltip |
| **Edit Mode** | OP use command `/cts editmode true` to enter |
| **Manage Items** | Freely add/delete items and drag to sort in edit mode |
| **Quick Swap** | Open item menu in edit mode, use left/right clicks to quickly swap trade items |

---

### 🔧 Compatibility Notes

- **Platform**: This mod is built on the Fabric 1.21.1 template
- **NeoForge 1.21.1**: Confirmed working with [**Sinytra Connector**](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), but not fully tested in multi-mod environments
